zh.lifeSummary: Agnes Whiscarde於1602年3月28日出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾韋爾。她於1626年3月30日與Richard Chapman在英國英格蘭賀特福爾維德福德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1652年在英國賀特福爾韋爾享年50歲，埋葬在英國賀特福爾韋爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Agnes Whiscarde于1602年3月28日出生在英国英格兰賀特福爾韋爾。她于1626年3月30日与Richard Chapman在英国英格兰賀特福爾維德福德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1652年在英国賀特福爾韋爾享年50岁，埋葬在英国賀特福爾韋爾。

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: Agnes Whiscarde was born on 28 March 1602, in Ware, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. She married Richard Chapman on 30 March 1626, in Widford, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1652, in Ware, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in Ware, Hertfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Agnes Whiscarde est née le 28 mars 1602, à Ware, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Richard Chapman le 30 mars 1626, à Widford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1652, à Ware, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à Ware, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Agnes Whiscarde wurde am 28. März 1602 in Ware, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat am 30. März 1626 in Widford, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom Richard Chapman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1652 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Ware, Hertfordshire, England und wurde in Ware, Hertfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Agnes Whiscarde è nata il il 28 marzo 1602 nel Ware, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato Richard Chapman il 30 marzo 1626, nel Widford, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1652, nel Ware, Hertfordshire, England, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolta a Ware, Hertfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Whiscardeは1602年3月28日にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアワーで生まれた。1626年3月30日にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアウィドフォードでRichard Chapmanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1652年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアワーで50歳で死去し，イギリスハートフォードシュアイアワーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Whiscarde(은)는 1602년 3월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 워에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1626년 3월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 위드퍼드에서 Richard Chapman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1652년 영국 허트퍼드실르 워에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허트퍼드실르 워에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Agnes Whiscarde nasceu em 28 de março de 1602, em Ware, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com Richard Chapman em 30 de março de 1626, em Widford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1652, em Ware, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 50 anos, e foi sepultada em Ware, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Agnes Whiscarde родилась 28 марта 1602 г. в местности вар, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Chapman 30 марта 1626 г. в местности видфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1652 г. в местности вар, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности вар, хиртфордшир, Англия.
